name: PRD §6.1: «Активные задачи проекта» (запрос-иллюстрация)
query: aspect=orbis/task, status=!done&!cancelled, excludeBlocked=true, children_of=this, sortBy=priority:desc|due_date:asc, limit=20, display=compact, title=Активные задачи проекта
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND aspects ? $1 AND (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' IS NULL OR aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' NOT IN ($2, $3)) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM relations r JOIN entities b ON b.id = r.source_id WHERE r.target_id = entities.id AND r.relation_type = 'blocks' AND COALESCE(b.aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status', '') NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled')) AND id IN (SELECT target_id FROM relations WHERE source_id = $4 AND relation_type = 'parent') ORDER BY CASE aspects->'orbis/task'->>'priority' WHEN 'low' THEN 0 WHEN 'medium' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 END DESC NULLS LAST, (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'due_date')::date ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT $5
countSql: SELECT count(*) FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND aspects ? $1 AND (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' IS NULL OR aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' NOT IN ($2, $3)) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM relations r JOIN entities b ON b.id = r.source_id WHERE r.target_id = entities.id AND r.relation_type = 'blocks' AND COALESCE(b.aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status', '') NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled')) AND id IN (SELECT target_id FROM relations WHERE source_id = $4 AND relation_type = 'parent')

name: Daily Planning «Inbox» (02 §3.3)
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND aspects ? $1 AND aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' IN ($2) ORDER BY created_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT $3
countSql: SELECT count(*) FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND aspects ? $1 AND aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' IN ($2)

name: Daily Planning «Сегодня» (02 §3.3)
query:
aspect=orbis/task, due_date=today|overdue, status=!done&!cancelled&!waiting,
         excludeBlocked=true, sortBy=priority:desc|due_date:asc,
         display=list, title=Сегодня
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND aspects ? $1 AND ((aspects->'orbis/task'->>'due_date')::date = $2::date OR (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'due_date')::date < $3::date) AND (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' IS NULL OR aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' NOT IN ($4, $5, $6)) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM relations r JOIN entities b ON b.id = r.source_id WHERE r.target_id = entities.id AND r.relation_type = 'blocks' AND COALESCE(b.aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status', '') NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled')) ORDER BY CASE aspects->'orbis/task'->>'priority' WHEN 'low' THEN 0 WHEN 'medium' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 END DESC NULLS LAST, (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'due_date')::date ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT $7

name: Daily Planning «Ожидание» (02 §3.3)
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND aspects ? $1 AND aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' IN ($2) ORDER BY updated_at ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT $3

name: Курсор агента: updated_at>…Z (§9.3)
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND updated_at > $1::timestamptz LIMIT $2

name: Числовой диапазон decimal: amount=500..2000
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND (aspects->'orbis/financial'->>'amount')::numeric BETWEEN $1::numeric AND $2::numeric LIMIT $3

name: Числовое сравнение decimal: amount>1000
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND (aspects->'orbis/financial'->>'amount')::numeric > $1::numeric LIMIT $2

name: archived=any — без фильтра архивности
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND aspects ? $1 LIMIT $2

name: archived=true — только архивные
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND archived LIMIT $1

name: Полнотекстовый поиск: search=API
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND (to_tsvector('simple', title) @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', $1) OR to_tsvector('simple', body) @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', $2)) LIMIT $3

name: Теги: tags OR + excludeTags
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND tags && ARRAY[$1, $2]::text[] AND NOT (tags && ARRAY[$3, $4]::text[]) LIMIT $5

name: Date-токен на timestamp-поле: start_at=next_7d (AT TIME ZONE)
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND ((aspects->'orbis/schedule'->>'start_at')::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE $1)::date BETWEEN $2::date AND $3::date + 7 ORDER BY (aspects->'orbis/schedule'->>'start_at')::timestamptz ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT $4

name: children_of=<uuid> и parents_of=this
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND id IN (SELECT target_id FROM relations WHERE source_id = $1 AND relation_type = 'parent') AND id IN (SELECT source_id FROM relations WHERE target_id = $2 AND relation_type = 'parent') LIMIT $3

name: Date-токен на core-timestamp: created_at=today
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND (created_at AT TIME ZONE $1)::date = $2::date LIMIT $3

name: anyOf: литерал + date-токен через | (OR по скобкам)
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'due_date' IN ($1) OR (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'due_date')::date < $2::date) LIMIT $3

name: Неоднозначное поле, разрешённое через aspect= (category_ref в financial и budget)
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND aspects ? $1 AND aspects->'orbis/budget'->>'category_ref' IN ($2) LIMIT $3

name: Upcoming «Ближайшие 7 дней» (02 §3.3): next_7d на date-поле
query:
aspect=orbis/task, due_date=next_7d, status=!done&!cancelled,
         sortBy=due_date:asc|priority:desc, display=list, title=Ближайшие 7 дней
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND aspects ? $1 AND (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'due_date')::date BETWEEN $2::date AND $3::date + 7 AND (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' IS NULL OR aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' NOT IN ($4, $5)) ORDER BY (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'due_date')::date ASC NULLS LAST, CASE aspects->'orbis/task'->>'priority' WHEN 'low' THEN 0 WHEN 'medium' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 END DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT $6

name: Upcoming «Позже» (02 §3.3): after_7d + limit=30
query:
aspect=orbis/task, due_date=after_7d, status=!done&!cancelled,
         sortBy=due_date:asc, limit=30, display=compact, title=Позже
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND aspects ? $1 AND (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'due_date')::date > $2::date + 7 AND (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' IS NULL OR aspects->'orbis/task'->>'status' NOT IN ($3, $4)) ORDER BY (aspects->'orbis/task'->>'due_date')::date ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT $5

name: Диапазон core-timestamp: updated_at=a..b
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND updated_at BETWEEN $1::timestamptz AND $2::timestamptz LIMIT $3

name: sortBy прочих типов: numeric-каст, строка в скобках, core-title колонкой
sql: SELECT id, owner_id, title, emoji, body, body_refs, tags, meta, aspects, created_at, updated_at, archived FROM entities WHERE true AND NOT archived AND aspects ? $1 ORDER BY (aspects->'orbis/financial'->>'amount')::numeric DESC NULLS LAST, (aspects->'orbis/financial'->>'counterparty') ASC NULLS LAST, title ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT $2
